basics.name: Zhenyuan Zhang
basics.label: Ph.D. Student
basics.summary: Ph.D. student in AIS at HKUST, working on Agent Memory.

work.name: GIGA
work.summary: Supervised by Zheng Zhu. Working on motion generation and VLA.
highlights: Contributed to Motion-R1, a text-to-motion generation framework combining Chain-of-Thought reasoning and reinforcement learning.
Led key aspects of engineering implementation including MotionCoT Data Engine for automated motion-stage annotation via LLMs.
Extended the GRPO method to motion synthesis, enabling efficient reward learning without handcrafted labels.

work.name: The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology
work.summary: Supervised by Prof. Wenhan Luo. Working on talking face/head generation and autonomous driving perception.
highlights: Implemented real-time inference acceleration for multimodal talking head generation models using TensorRT and ONNX Runtime.
Developed state-of-the-art deep learning models for object detection (YOLO) and multi-object tracking (DeepSORT).
Leveraged TensorRT for model acceleration on NVIDIA Jetson Orin platforms using ROS.
Enhanced multi-sensor fusion algorithms (LiDAR-camera fusion) for improved perception accuracy.

publications.name: Multi-Scale Semantic-Guidance Networks: Robust Blind Face Restoration Against Adversarial Attacks
publications.summary: Robust blind face restoration method against adversarial attacks using multi-scale semantic guidance.
